news.t: Berkshire Hathaway Meeting Could Spark This ETF
Direxion launches new leveraged ETFs tied to Palantir, Berkshire Hathaway
Direxion Unveils Berkshire Hathaway and Palantir Single Stock Leveraged and Inverse ETFs

holdings.infoBox: BRKU is an equity ETF with a total of 13 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily BRKB Bull 2X ETF (BRKU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Berkshire Hathaway Stock. BRKU was launched on Dec 11, 2024 and is issued by Direxion.
